# godaddy_domain_contacts (Resource)

Manage the full contact set for an existing GoDaddy domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) Existing GoDaddy domain to manage.

### Optional

- `admin` (Block, Optional) Admin contact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--admin))
- `billing` (Block, Optional) Billing contact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--billing))
- `identity_document_id` (String) Optional identity document identifier. When set, the provider uses the v2 contacts update path and waits for the asynchronous domain action to complete.
- `registrant` (Block, Optional) Registrant contact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--registrant))
- `tech` (Block, Optional) Tech contact. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tech))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Canonical resource identifier equal to the domain name.

<a id="nestedblock--admin"></a>
### Nested Schema for `admin`

Required:

- `email` (String) Email address.
- `name_first` (String) First name.
- `name_last` (String) Last name.
- `phone` (String) Phone number.

Optional:

- `address_mailing` (Block, Optional) Mailing address. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--admin--address_mailing))
- `fax` (String) Fax number.
- `job_title` (String) Job title.
- `name_middle` (String) Middle name.
- `organization` (String) Organization name.

<a id="nestedblock--admin--address_mailing"></a>
### Nested Schema for `admin.address_mailing`

Required:

- `address1` (String) Address line 1.
- `city` (String) City.
- `country` (String) ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code.
- `postal_code` (String) Postal code.
- `state` (String) State or province.

Optional:

- `address2` (String) Address line 2.
